payload.answer: Rejected: normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands, and no memory was created or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted admin SQL command from a normal user and should not be routed to memory creation or execution.

details: No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: If you need a memory deleted, request deletion through the supported user-facing memory controls.
If you believe you should have admin access, authenticate through the appropriate administrative channel.
